title: Ultra-Processed Foods Are Not Always the Cheapest Calories
description: An exploration into the relationship between food processing and affordability across major grocery retailers. Comparing distributions to see if less processed food can remain competitive in cost.

title: Power Outage Severity by Location
description: Analysis of major U.S. power outages: location-based hypothesis testing, regression to predict customers affected, and fairness analysis.

title: The Man in the Middle
description: In-depth analysis of cutoff decision making at the minor league level using random forest classification on a dataset of anonymized minor league player and ball tracking data.
